title: Spices Board Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 10 Spices Extension Trainee Posts
description: Spices Board of India has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the 10 vacancies for Spices Extension Trainee posts. Those candidates who have qualified for any degree can use this chance and apply for the Spices Board Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are looking for more, here ...
